source.name: Claude Code Documentation
source.format: HTML pages with markdown source available at .md suffix
source.update-frequency: Daily — Claude Code ships updates continuously
source.plugin: none — this is our own docs, we crawl directly

rate-limits.known-limits: No published rate limits. Docs are static CDN-served.
rate-limits.decision: Start with polite preset. Monitor for 429s. Adjust if static CDN confirms no rate limiting.

processing.content-extraction: CSS selector "main" for page body, "title" for title
processing.hashing: SHA-256 of full body content for change detection

known-issues.issue: llms.txt lists relative .md paths, not full URLs. Spider must construct full URLs by prepending base-url. Some paths may not follow the pattern.

decisions.decision: Crawl daily via cron (crawler/schedules/daily-docs.sh). This is the primary doc source for the platform-manager skill — changes here directly affect our SDK directives and skill documentation.
